owner_operator_stated: Dr. Vikash Huliyar founded Neo Endodontics
notes: Address 1448 W Madison St, Suite 2, Chicago IL 60607 matches record exactly, corroborating this site. The site's own listed public phone (312) 450-7636 differs from the record's (630) 908-0120, but npiprofile.com's NPI record for this same NPI at this same address independently lists (630) 908-0120 (likely the NPI-registration/billing line vs. the public front-desk line) -- address match alone satisfies corroboration. This is a specialist endodontic practice (Neo Endodontics), the DBA of entity 'Vikash Huliyar DDS MS PLLC', not general dentistry. No careers page found. Vendor hint 'Flossacademy.Com' was unrelated/wrong.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Ned and Dr. Chris opened the flagship West Loop office in April 2013
notes: Address (1017 W Madison St, Chicago IL 60607) and phone ((312) 759-1120) both corroborated exactly on the practice's own site. Skyline Smiles is a multi-location Chicago-area dental group (West Loop flagship plus Bucktown, Roscoe Village, South Chicago, and an Elmhurst/Indiana-area location) -- a small local group, not a single independent office. The careers page lists openings across the group generally; not confirmed as West-Loop-specific. Vendor hint domain 'dentalsmilesofwestloop.com' was not the actual site found; real site is skylinesmiles.com.
